name: Chefs' Warehouse, Inc.
business: The Chefs' Warehouse is a premier distributor of specialty food and center-of-the-plate products in the United States, the Middle East, and Canada, serving chefs in independent restaurants, fine dining, and other upscale foodservice venues. It offers over 90,000 SKUs from more than 4,000 suppliers, with a focus on hard-to-find gourmet ingredients and proteins. The company also markets certain center-of-the-plate products directly to consumers through its Allen Brothers e-commerce platform.

exposures.sentence: We are implementing wearable inventory scanning devices as our selection technology as we migrate away from voice pick systems in each of our distribution facilities, which enables our warehouse employees to fill orders with greater speed and accuracy and reduce damages and returns.
We are utilizing advancements in search and artificial intelligence to enable us to better predict our customers needs so that we can deliver the same level of service online as we do offline.

We believe that our current systems are scalable and can be leveraged together with targeted investments in new technology like artificial intelligence, robotics, drones and low-code development to provide the fuel to drive profitable growth.
We are driving increasing sales volume through our e-commerce platform by optimizing our customers re-order and product discovery journeys.
Information technology system failures, cybersecurity incidents or other disruptions to our use of technology and networks could interrupt our operations and adversely affect our business.

catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, we entered into an asset purchase agreement to acquire substantially all of the assets of Italco Food Products ( Italco ), a specialty food distributor based in Denver, Colorado.

In August 2025, we entered into an amendment to our asset-based loan (the ABL ) credit agreement, which extended the maturity date to August 20, 2030, eliminated the credit spread adjustment to the interest rate charged on borrowings and increased the aggregate letters of credit.

catalysts.event: Amendment to senior secured term loan and prepayment
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we further amended our senior secured term loan agreement to reduce the interest rate spread on our senior secured term loan facility, as well as made voluntary principal prepayments of $5.0 million.
